sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Every page opens with navigation — Validator archetype benefits from a minimal nav that focuses attention on conversion at the decision stage.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Hero section establishes immediate context for the Validator archetype — with-social-proof variant builds instant credibility at the decision moment.

sections.name: Social proof
sections.rationale: Validator archetype requires credibility anchors — logos from recognizable brands reduce friction at the decision stage.

sections.name: Features
sections.rationale: Decision-stage Validators need specific, outcome-oriented feature articulation — 3-col-icon layout supports systematic evaluation.

sections.name: Testimonial
sections.rationale: Validator archetype converts on peer evidence — a single featured testimonial with attribution at the decision stage is the highest-trust signal.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.rationale: Decision-stage requires clear pricing commitment — highlighted variant focuses the Validator on the recommended plan.

sections.name: Conversion
sections.rationale: Terminal conversion prompt for Validator at decision stage — split variant with trust signal addresses final objections.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Every page closes with footer — with-cta variant recaptures departing Validators on this conversion-critical page.

page.reasoning: Notes specify 'minimal variant for conversion-focused pages — strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only' — this is the decision stage.
Notes specify 'with-social-proof variant places LogoStrip immediately below CTACluster' — Validator archetype needs instant credibility.
Notes specify 'logos-only is the highest-frequency placement' — silent credibility without copy overhead for Mover/Validator awareness pages.
Notes specify 'Validator benefits from specific, outcome-oriented descriptions — not feature names, benefit statements' — 3-col-icon for 6 features.
Notes specify 'with-photo increases engagement and perceived authenticity' — Validator archetype needs humanized social proof.
Notes specify 'highlighted variant for recommended plan — use sparingly' — Validator at decision stage needs a clear recommended path.
Notes specify 'split for section-end with directional copy on left, CTA on right' — Validator benefits from subhead and trust_signal addressing final objections.
Notes specify 'with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows'.
